name: Flux Operator
what_it_does: A Kubernetes CRD controller that automates the lifecycle of CNCF Flux CD across cluster fleets, handling installation, configuration, upgrades, multi-tenancy, and ephemeral preview environments. Includes an MCP server for AI-assisted GitOps operations.
use_cases: Fleet-wide automated installation and upgrades of Flux controllers across multiple Kubernetes clusters
Self-service application deployment using ResourceSet API for platform engineering teams
Ephemeral preview environments triggered by pull requests from GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, or Azure DevOps
AI-assisted GitOps troubleshooting and deployment analysis via the Flux MCP Server
not_for: Non-Kubernetes deployments or traditional VM-based infrastructure
Standalone CI/CD pipelines without GitOps methodology
Simple single-cluster setups where bare Flux CD suffices
best_when: An agent needs to manage, monitor, or troubleshoot GitOps deployments across Kubernetes clusters using Flux CD, especially at fleet scale.
avoid_when: You are not using Kubernetes or Flux CD, or your deployment model does not follow GitOps principles.

auth.notes: Authentication handled via Kubernetes RBAC and secret-based Git credentials. No separate auth system for the operator itself.

pricing.notes: AGPL-3.0 licensed. ControlPlane offers an enterprise distribution with automated CVE patches and hotfixes (pricing not public).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Error handling through Kubernetes CRD status conditions and FluxReport resources. MCP server error handling not extensively documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Kubernetes CRDs are declarative and inherently idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: MCP server is a secondary feature, not the primary interface
Requires existing Kubernetes cluster access and Flux familiarity
AGPL-3.0 license has copyleft implications for derivative works

security_score_components.security_notes: GitOps CD operator for Kubernetes. RBAC-controlled. Flux service account needs minimal RBAC. Git credentials in Secrets — use sealed secrets or external-secrets. High blast radius on k8s clusters.
